page_content: College Requirements (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/ undergraduate/colleges-schools/behavioral-social-sciences/ American Government STAT100 Elementary Statistics and Probability MATH107 Introduction to Math Modeling and Probability MATH113 College Algebra and Trigonometry MATH115 Precalculus MATH120 Elementary Calculus I MATH135 Discrete Mathematics for Life Sciences MATH136 Calculus for Life Sciences MATH140 Calculus I Scope and Methods for Political Science Research Advanced Empirical Research International Political Relations The Study of Comparative Politics or GVPT282 The Politics of Global Development One GVPT 100-200 level course (must be IR/CP topic) GVPT Methods Course 300-400 level 1 GVPT IR/Comparative Quantitative Methods Course 300-400 level 1 GVPT Quantitative Methods Course 300-400 level 1 GVPT IR/Comparative Courses of Choice 300-400 level Principles of Microeconomics Completion of a foreign language through the entire elementary level Additional Skills Course (Intermediate-level foreign language course or additional quantitative course from approved list) 2,3 3 3-4 3 3 3 3 3 3 3 3 9 3 4-12 3 3
